'''Nic Whoma''' was an unsavory [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]].<ref name="Jedi" /> During a [[Local day/Legends|night]]<ref name="AOTC" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> the Gran attended the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]], a [[Nightclub/Legends|nightclub]] and [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] hall on<ref name="Club">{{CSWECite|II|431|Outlander Club}}</ref> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Complete Locations">[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2005)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']]</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Club" /> During Whoma's visit, the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] ran into the club trying to [[Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala/Legends|escape]] from the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. When Skywalker separated from his partner to survey the crowd, Whoma was stood with a group of clubgoers,<ref name="AOTC" /> including the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Ror Ithh]].<ref name="Jedi" /> When Skywalker walked near the group again, Whoma and Ithh interacted with two [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]].<ref name="AOTC" />

Whoma had [[Color/Legends|orange]] skin and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="AOTC" /> Being a Gran, the gambler added to the interplanetary feel of the club on the night of their visit.<ref name="FF96">{{FactFile|96|OUT 1-2|Outlander Nightclub Patrons}}</ref> Whoma wore gray [[Armor/Legends|armor]] during their visit to the club.<ref name="AOTC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nic Whoma was created for<ref name="Insider" /> the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']],<ref name="AOTC" /> which released on [[May 16]], [[2002]].<ref name="Year">''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]''</ref> The character's costume,<ref name="Insider" /> partially created by special effects artist [[Nick Dudman]],<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|mawhonic|Mawhonic}}</ref> was reused from the character [[Mawhonic/Legends|Mawhonic]], who appeared in the previous prequel trilogy film, [[1999]]'s [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|75|Who's Who in the Outlander Club: It's Ladies' Night}}</ref> The Outlander Club scenes, where the character was portrayed by an uncredited extra,<ref name="AOTC" /> were shot on [[July 17]], [[2000]] at [[Fox Studios, Sydney]].<ref name="Mythmaking">''[[Mythmaking: Behind the Scenes of Attack of the Clones]]''</ref> Prior to the release of Episode II, the character made their first appearance<ref name="AOTCComic">[[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones 1|''Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones'' 1]]</ref> on [[April 17]], 2002,<ref name="Date">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/00-468/Star-Wars-Episode-II----Attack-of-the-Clones-1|text=Star Wars: Episode II -- Attack of the Clones #1}}</ref> with the release of the [[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones 1|first issue]] of the [[Dark Horse Comics]] [[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones (comic series)|adaptation]] of the film. The issue was written by [[Henry Gilroy]] and illustrated by [[Jan Duursema]].<ref name="AOTCComic" />

The character's name was first mentioned in an image in the [[May 2]], [[2003]] [[StarWars.com]] web article "[[Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases]]", where it was applied to an image of Mawhonic.<ref name="Cantina">{{SWArchive|url=episode-iv/bts/article/f20030502/index.html|text=Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases|int=Cantina Roll-Call: Shedding Light on Some Alien Aliases}}</ref> The name was first tied to the character appearing in Episode II through the StarWars.com [[Image Attack]] feature on [[November 6]], 2003.<ref name="Jedi" /> Whoma's name, anagrammed from Mawhonic, is a tribute to the character.<ref name="Insider" />
